variables.name: BP
variables.description: Bodily Pain

variables.name: BP01
variables.description: How much bodily pain have you had during the last 4 weeks

variables.name: BP02
variables.description: During the past 4 weeks, how much did pain interfere with your normal work

variables.name: BP_NBS
variables.description: Bodily Pain NBS

variables.name: GH
variables.description: General Health

variables.name: GH01
variables.description: In general, would you say your health is

variables.name: GH02
variables.description: How TRUE or FALSE is each of the following statements for you: I seem to get sick a little easier than other people

variables.name: GH03
variables.description: How TRUE or FALSE is each of the following statements for you: I am as healthy as anybody I know

variables.name: GH04
variables.description: How TRUE or FALSE is each of the following statements for you: I expect my health to get worse

variables.name: GH05
variables.description: How TRUE or FALSE is each of the following statements for you: My health is excellent

variables.name: GH_NBS
variables.description: General Health NBS

variables.name: Group
variables.description: Sub Group

variables.name: HT
variables.description: Compared to one year ago, how would you rate your health in general now

variables.name: MCS
variables.description: Mental Component Summary

variables.name: MH
variables.description: Mental Health

variables.name: MH01
variables.description: How much of the time during the past 4 weeks: Have you been very nervous

variables.name: MH02
variables.description: How much of the time during the past 4 weeks: Have you felt so down in the dumps that nothing could cheer you up

variables.name: MH03
variables.description: How much of the time during the past 4 weeks: Have you felt calm and peaceful

variables.name: MH04
variables.description: How much of the time during the past 4 weeks: Have you felt downhearted and depressed

variables.name: MH05
variables.description: How much of the time during the past 4 weeks: Have you been happy

variables.name: MH_NBS
variables.description: Mental Health NBS

variables.name: PCS
variables.description: Physical Component Summary

variables.name: PF
variables.description: Physical functioning

variables.name: PF01
variables.description: Does your health now limit you in these activities: Vigorous activities, such as running, lifting heavy objects, participating in strenuous sports

variables.name: PF02
variables.description: Does your health now limit you in these activities: Moderate activities, such as moving a table, pushing a vacuum cleaner, bowling, or playing golf

variables.name: PF03
variables.description: Does your health now limit you in these activities: Lifting or carrying groceries

variables.name: PF04
variables.description: Does your health now limit you in these activities: Climbing several flights of stairs

variables.name: PF05
variables.description: Does your health now limit you in these activities: Climbing one flight of stairs

variables.name: PF06
variables.description: Does your health now limit you in these activities: Bending, kneeling, or stooping

variables.name: PF07
variables.description: Does your health now limit you in these activities: Walking more than a mile

variables.name: PF08
variables.description: Does your health now limit you in these activities: Walking several hundred yards

variables.name: PF09
variables.description: Does your health now limit you in these activities: Walking one hundred yards

variables.name: PF10
variables.description: Does your health now limit you in these activities: Bathing or dressing yourself

variables.name: PF_NBS
variables.description: Physical Functioning NBS

variables.name: RE
variables.description: Role Emotional

variables.name: RE01
variables.description: During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had any of the following problems with your work or other regular daily activities as a result of any emotional problems: Cut down on the amount of time you spent on work or other activities

variables.name: RE02
variables.description: During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had any of the following problems with your work or other regular daily activities as a result of any emotional problems: Accomplished less than you would like

variables.name: RE03
variables.description: During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had any of the following problems with your work or other regular daily activities as a result of any emotional problems: Did work or other activities less carefully than usual

variables.name: RE_NBS
variables.description: Role Emotional NBS

variables.name: RP
variables.description: Role Physical

variables.name: RP01
variables.description: During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had any of the following problems with your work or other regular daily activities as a result of your physical health: Cut down on the amount of time you spent on work or other activities

variables.name: RP02
variables.description: During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had any of the following problems with your work or other regular daily activities as a result of your physical health: Accomplished less than you would like

variables.name: RP03
variables.description: During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had any of the following problems with your work or other regular daily activities as a result of your physical health: Were limited in the kind of work or other activities

variables.name: RP04
variables.description: During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had any of the following problems with your work or other regular daily activities as a result of your physical health: Had difficulty performing the work or other activities (for example, it took extra effort)

variables.name: RP_NBS
variables.description: Role Physical NBS

variables.name: SF
variables.description: Social Functioning

variables.name: SF01
variables.description: During the past 4 weeks, to what extent has your physical health or emotional problems interfered with your normal social activities with family, friends, neighbors, or groups

variables.name: SF02
variables.description: During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time has your physical health or emotional problems interfered with your social activities

variables.name: SF_NBS
variables.description: Social Functioning NBS

variables.name: VT
variables.description: Vitality

variables.name: VT01
variables.description: How much of the time during the past 4 weeks: Did you feel full of life

variables.name: VT02
variables.description: How much of the time during the past 4 weeks: Did you have a lot of energy

variables.name: VT03
variables.description: How much of the time during the past 4 weeks: Did you feel worn out

variables.name: VT04
variables.description: How much of the time during the past 4 weeks: Did you feel tired

variables.name: VT_NBS
variables.description: Vitality NBS
